title: Agents
subtitle: Create a new Agent to route specific channels to a separate personality or workspace.
gatewayWarning: Gateway service is not running. Agent/channel changes may take a moment to apply.

createDialog.title: Add Agent
createDialog.description: Create a new agent by name, optionally point it at a custom workspace, and choose whether to inherit the main agent's bootstrap files.
createDialog.workspaceDescription: This host path is mounted inside the sandbox as /workspace for the agent runtime.
createDialog.inheritWorkspaceDescription: Copy SOUL.md, AGENTS.md, etc. from the main agent

deleteDialog.title: Delete Agent
deleteDialog.message: Delete "{{name}}" from InvestClaw? This permanently deletes the agent and its InvestClaw-managed workspace, runtime, and session files from disk.

settingsDialog.title: {{name}} Settings
settingsDialog.description: Update the agent name and manage which channels belong to this agent.
settingsDialog.modelProviderEmpty: No provider accounts configured. Add one in Settings → AI Providers.
settingsDialog.modelOverrideDescription: Select provider and model ID for this agent.
settingsDialog.unsavedChangesMessage: You have unsaved changes. If you close now, your changes will be discarded.
settingsDialog.workspaceDescription: Point this agent at a host workspace and inspect the files that will appear inside the sandbox at /workspace.
settingsDialog.workspaceSavedHint: The explorer below shows the saved workspace currently attached to this agent.
settingsDialog.workspaceUnsavedHint: Save the new workspace path to refresh the explorer and container mapping.
settingsDialog.workspaceExplorerDescription: Browse the workspace mounted for this agent and preview common text and image files.
settingsDialog.workspaceMissing: This workspace path does not exist on the host yet. Save a valid path or create the directory first.
settingsDialog.workspaceSelectFile: Select a file from the workspace explorer to preview it here.
settingsDialog.workspaceUnsupportedPreview: This file type does not have an inline preview yet.
settingsDialog.workspaceImageTooLarge: This image is too large for inline preview, but the file is present in the workspace.
settingsDialog.workspacePreviewTruncated: Preview truncated to the first part of the file.
settingsDialog.channelsDescription: This list is read-only. Manage channel accounts and bindings in the Channels page.
settingsDialog.channelsManagedInChannels: This agent is linked to channel types. Manage exact account bindings in the Channels page.
settingsDialog.noChannels: No channels are assigned to this agent yet.

removeChannelDialog.title: Remove Channel
removeChannelDialog.message: Remove {{name}} from InvestClaw? This deletes the current channel configuration.

toast.workspaceSymlinkUnsupported: Workspace explorer does not follow symbolic links.
toast.agentModelInvalid: Model must be in provider/model format
